eu_ai_act.risk_rationale: Standard supply chain process with no identified high-risk characteristics

gaps: No evidence of formal AI risk assessment or impact analysis process
Missing transparency/explainability requirements for automated carrier decisions
Insufficient accountability and human oversight mechanisms beyond basic escalation
Lack of documented continual improvement, internal audit, or management review processes
recommendations: Implement structured AI risk management framework per ISO 42001 Clause 6
Add decision logging and explainability features for rated shipments
Define clear roles, responsibilities, and escalation to human oversight
Establish monitoring, measurement, and management review cycles

certificate.notes: Guardian review completed. Risk level: minimal. Quality: 100%
